_publications._publicationTitle: Quality of life in individuals with neurofibromatosis type 1 associated cutaneous neurofibromas: validation of the Dutch cNF-Skindex.

_contextSnippet: The mean total cNF-Skindex score was 40.7...Nine participants had a total cNF-Skindex score that placed them in severity stratum 1 (nonbothersome cNF, 15%), 28 were in stratum 2 (moderately bothersome cNF, 48%) and 22 patients were in stratum 3
details: Mean total score of 40.7 with severity stratification: 15% nonbothersome, 48% moderately bothersome, 37% very bothersome cutaneous neurofibromas
